underlying_goal: Understand how Claude Code's /insights capability works internally, then leverage that understanding to build a cross-platform insights system spanning Claude Code and OpenAI Codex
friction_detail: Claude initially and confidently denied that /insights was a native Claude Code feature, requiring the user to provide multiple external article links to correct Claude's misconception.
brief_summary: User wanted to understand Claude Code's native /insights feature and build a cross-platform insights consolidation system; Claude initially denied the feature existed but corrected course after user provided evidence, and began scaffolding the cross-platform solution.
